text: © DynamoDB Global Tables @ rosseamcanstie @ snan ¢ Global tables provides multi-master cross-region replication e Tables are created in multiple regions and added to the same global table (becoming replica tables) e Last writer wins is used for conflict resolution * Reads and Writes can occur to any region ¢ Generally sub-second replication between regions e Strongly consistent reads ONLY in the same region as writes
